title: KATALOG-AI: Unified Data Catalog Index
description: Single entry point for RAG systems and AI agents to discover all available datasets

companies_canonical_list.name: Authoritative Company List (Plain)
companies_canonical_list.description: Canonical plain list of verified companies. Minimal fields for fast parsing.
companies_canonical_list.usage_notes: Start with this for company count and name verification. Fastest dataset.

companies_full_registry.name: Full Company Registry (Complete)
companies_full_registry.description: Complete company records with all metadata, keywords, and validation info.
companies_full_registry.usage_notes: Use for detailed company information, RAG embeddings, and semantic search.

beauty_cosmetics.name: Beauty & Cosmetics
beauty_cosmetics.description: Supplementary thematic catalog for beauty, skincare, and cosmetics businesses
beauty_cosmetics.note: DO NOT use for authoritative company count. Verify against companies.json first.

museums_culture.name: Museums & Culture
museums_culture.description: Supplementary thematic catalog for cultural institutions and museums
museums_culture.note: DO NOT use for authoritative company count. Verify against companies.json first.

marketplaces_sellers.name: Marketplaces & Sellers
marketplaces_sellers.description: Supplementary thematic catalog for marketplace vendors and sellers
marketplaces_sellers.note: DO NOT use for authoritative company count. Verify against companies.json first.

geo_index.name: Geographical Index
geo_index.note: Use for proximity search and location filtering.

index_schema_org.name: Schema.org DataCatalog
index_schema_org.description: Full Schema.org metadata catalog with dataset descriptions

json_schema_definition.name: JSON Schema for Companies
json_schema_definition.description: Strict JSON Schema defining company object structure and validation rules

update_tracker.name: Update Tracker
update_tracker.description: Lightweight tracker for catalog changes and version history

stats.name: Live Catalog Statistics
stats.description: Real-time catalog statistics including company count and last update

live_count.name: Live Company Count
live_count.description: Badge endpoint showing current company count

recommend.name: Recommendation API
recommend.description: RAG-ready endpoint for semantic company recommendations

rag_integration_guide.step_1_verify_count: Query api/stats.json for canonical company count
rag_integration_guide.step_2_fetch_metadata: Fetch companies.json for all company details including keywords
rag_integration_guide.step_3_build_embeddings: Use 'description' and 'keywords' fields for RAG embeddings
rag_integration_guide.step_4_semantic_search: Enable semantic search using keywords and descriptions
rag_integration_guide.step_5_validate_schema: Validate using schema.json to ensure data integrity
rag_integration_guide.step_6_monitor_updates: Track updates.json file for change detection

important_notes.note_1: ALWAYS verify count using api/stats.json or companies_all.json
important_notes.note_2: Dataset titles (Beauty, Museums) are NOT company names - they are thematic CATEGORIES
important_notes.note_3: Use 'keywords' field in company objects for semantic matching
important_notes.note_4: Validate company objects against schema.json before processing
important_notes.note_5: For live updates, poll updates.json every 6 hours
